Plaintiff Combs And Greenley, Inc'S Motion For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ELIZABETH MCDONALD, TEL. NO. 922-5933, SPECIALL APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Combs And Greenley, Inc'S Motion For Monetary Sanctions is granted. Defendant shall pay a monetary sanction of $1,802.50 to Plaintiff within 15 calendar days of the entry of this order. The imposition of monetary sanctions for a party's refusal to comply with a previous sanctions order is provided for by, inter alia, Code Civ. Proc. 2030.290(c) and 2023.030(a).
Defendant's request for monetary sanctions is denied. And even if defendant's position were justified, which it is not, an attorney acting in propria persona may not recover attorney's fees as a discovery sanction. Argaman v. Ratan, 73 Cal.App.4th 1173, 1175 (1999). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Protem Judge: Jim Weixel, Not reported. =302/HK

Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order.
All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
